name: Raven Bow
description: Ravens are known to be the ferrymen of the dead. This bow's limb is decorated with raven feathers, which forebode the imminent death of its target.

description.r1: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by __12%__.
description.r2: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by __15%__.
description.r3: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by __18%__.
description.r4: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by __21%__.
description.r5: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by __24%__.
